extra.reason: Seed complete — echo MCP server, full OAuth 2.1 scaffolding (RFC 9728/8414/7591/7636), tests, Dockerfile, deploy script, and complete docs. Verified: go test/vet/fmt clean, live smoke test of all discovery/auth/probe endpoints.
Extracted oauth.go into pkg/mcpauth with Store interface, NewAuthServer, Mount, RequireBearer, and ResolveSubject hook. Tests moved to pkg/mcpauth. All quality gates pass.

Moved main.go, mcp.go, Dockerfile, scripts/, Makefile into hello-world/. Module path stays at repo root (go.mod shared with pkg/mcpauth). hello-world/Makefile delegates go commands to repo root. CI unchanged — runs from root, covers full module. All quality gates pass.

Confirmed: hello-world sees GET / → 409 at 15:33:38 and 15:40:31 (after cold starts/redeploys). Root /{$} vs /sse path makes no difference — SDK enforces one-stream-per-session regardless. Added KeepAlive: 30*time.Second to ServerOptions in hello-world/mcp.go. Updated LESSONS_LEARNED §12 with hello-world-specific observation. --no-traffic validated by eldamo-server agent; checklist items already present.

Completed via live Gemini Spark connections (2026-07-02). Deployed hello-world-spark to Cloud Run, connected from Spark UI, captured full traces with MCP method logging: HEAD probe → PRM → AS → DCR → consent → PKCE token → initialize → tools/list → tools/call. Documented in LESSONS_LEARNED §2 (exact request sequence) and §13-16 (method logging, spec-field support, creative tool use). Confirms parity with eldamo-server production result.
